mapper.select: SELECT f.id , f.created_at as createdAt , f.original_file_name as originalFileName , f.file_url as fileUrl , f.size , u.name as uploaderName FROM tb_file f JOIN user_space us ON f.user_space_id = us.id JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE us.space_id = #{spaceId} AND f.deleted = false AND us.deleted = false ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
